channel.title: Iteration on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in Iteration on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Simulating mixed effects
item.description: library(tidyverse) library(lmerTest) Here is one pattern for simulating a dataset with random effects. I’ll generate data for a study where subjects are in one of two conditions (A and B) and respond to stimuli of two versions (congruent and incongruent). The DV is reaction time. Subjects First, we need to generate a sample of subjects. Each subject will have slightly faster or slower reaction times on average; this is their random intercept sub_i).
